markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.067 — Rules

The governing body of a municipality may adopt rules governing hearings or notice of hearings that the governing body considers advisable to give all property owners a full hearing on assessments against them because of the special benefits.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
